282906.name_en: When [Martial Art Skill: Snaring Lash] staggers or controls a target, it increases their damage taken by 10% for 10s and grants you 3s of Tenacity.

282907.name_en: Special Skill - Sky Grasped restores 0.6 bars of Heaven's Will and 3% Max HP for each enemy unit hit, counting up to 5 enemies.

283000.name_en: When hitting a non-defending unit, [Light Attack Varied Combo: Wicked Defiance] grants 10% HP Drain for 10 seconds.

283001.name_en: Hitting a non-defending target with Gauntlets: Light Attack - Righteous Reign inflicts 1 stack of Vulnerability for 12 seconds. Each stack increases their damage taken by 2%, stacking up to 3 times. Cooldown: 1 second.

283002.name_en: Hitting the same unit 4 times consecutively (with intervals no longer than 2 seconds) with Rope Dart - Light Attack grants 0.5 bar of Heaven's Will.

283003.name_en: [Heavy Attack - Crisscross Stance] Land 4 consecutive hits on the same target within 2 seconds between hits to trigger an additional 1 Qi Damage on all subsequent hits to that target.

283004.name_en: Hitting a non-defending unit with Light Attack Varied Combo: Wicked Injustice grants 15% HP Drain for 10 seconds.

283005.name_en: Hitting a non-defending target with Gauntlets: Light Attack - Righteous Reign inflicts 1 stack of Vulnerability for 12 seconds. Each stack increases their damage taken by 2%, stacking up to 4 times. Cooldown: 1 second.

283006.name_en: Hitting the same unit 3 times consecutively (with intervals no longer than 2 seconds) with Rope Dart - Light Attack grants 0.5 bar of Heaven's Will.

283007.name_en: After hitting the same unit 3 times consecutively (with intervals no longer than 2 seconds) with Heavy Attack - Boundless Whirl, gains 0.2 bars of Heaven's Will, and each subsequent hit of this skill deals 1 bonus Qi Damage to this target.
